[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000000 1
1 000101101 4
2 011100111 6
3 111100100 5
4 001110010 4
5 101111101 7
6 011000110 4
7 011000101 4

01 10 011101111 7

56 65 011000111 5
67 76 011111101 7
70 07 001111101 6

50 05 011101111 7
61 16 011100111 6 match 2
72 27 111111100 7

15 51 011100111 6 match 2
26 62 111100101 6
37 73 001111010 5
